results.question: what do international students need to do before arriving at uic?
results.judge_reasoning: The system failed to provide any response due to a fetch failure. This represents a complete system failure rather than an appropriate abstention with redirection. missed_facts: F-1 students must complete Immigration Check-In with OIS to remove SEVIS hold
J-1 students must validate with OIS within 30 days of arrival
OIS is in SSB 2160, open Mon-Fri 8:30AM-5PM
Students need valid immigration documents for check-in

results.question: are uic athletic events free for students?

missed_facts: Regular season home events are FREE for students with valid UIC student ID
Basketball student section (Flame Force): Gate 3, Credit Union 1 Arena, sections 110-112
Flames Fast Pass: $50/year is a non-student season pass covering all home events except basketball
UIC competes in Missouri Valley Conference (MVC)
Students can follow @uic_studentsection for basketball game day info
